keyComponents: amber-to-green gradient hero card with 4 stats
2-column specimen-card grid: activity list + quick actions
full-width progress bar card with project percentages
pill-shaped search bar with filter pills (All/Active/Archived)
6 project cards with status dots, tech stack tags, metadata
Create New Project action button
left folder navigation panel (sticky)
right panel with metadata grid and task checklist
breadcrumb navigation back to projects
Backlog (3 cards), In Progress (2), Review (2), Done (3)
drag-and-drop between columns with count updates
label badges (Feature/Research/Design/Bug Fix)
centered pill toolbar (select/container/text/line/zoom)
5 draggable nodes with SVG dashed connections
canvas area with white background
6 entity cards (User, Project, Idea, KanbanCard, KanbanColumn, AuditLog)
SVG curved connection paths between entities
PK/FK badges with color-coded field types
Generate/Preview/Export action buttons
nested folder tree with toggle arrows
folder and file SVG icons
quick-capture form with priority select and tag input
6 idea cards with title, description, tags, priority, promote button
promoted state with dashed border and badge
6 messages (3 user, 3 AI) with avatar bubbles
tool action blocks (add_idea, update_kanban, generate_tree)
code block in dark theme
bottom input bar with send button
Account (name, email, avatar)
Subscription (Free/Pro/Team cards with current badge)
Preferences (4 toggle switches)
Integrations (GitHub connected, Slack/Figma not connected)
Data & Privacy (export, danger zone)

antiRepeatCompliance: Pass 1 used horizontal shelf nav with walnut panels — this pass uses floating bottom dock with pill icons and centered panel
Pass 2 used radial hub-spoke with orbital rings and Saarinen tulip geometry — this pass uses simple centered layout with spring bounce transitions
Pass 3 used floating pill nav with stacked card carousel and Girard textile collage — this pass uses bottom dock with vertical scroll and museum specimen aesthetic
Pass 4 used hidden hamburger with fullscreen overlay and Noguchi zen garden — this pass uses always-visible dock with warm gradient hero

Pass 5 used same structural profile (floating-dock-bar) but with completely different execution: Lora+Karla typography vs Playfair Display+Source Serif 4, blush/salmon palette vs amber/green, Danish hygge/cozy persona vs design showroom/museum curator, letter-writing chat vs avatar-bubble chat, bookshelf spines projects vs card grid projects, knit-pattern textures vs clean pill shapes
Pass 6 used collapsible left sidebar with accordion sections and pop art Warhol aesthetic — this pass uses centered single panel with warm organic tones

differentiationFromPass5.typography: Playfair Display + Source Serif 4 (high-end editorial serif pair) vs Lora + Karla (warm casual pair)
differentiationFromPass5.palette: Amber #c46b2e + Forest green #2d6b4f (showroom warmth) vs Blush #d4927a + Tan #a08060 (hygge cozy)
differentiationFromPass5.persona: Museum showroom curator with exhibit labels vs Danish hygge with knit textures and candlelight
differentiationFromPass5.heroCard: Amber-to-green gradient hero card vs weather-widget stat cards
differentiationFromPass5.projectsLayout: 2-column card grid with search/filter toolbar vs bookshelf spines with list view
differentiationFromPass5.chatLayout: Avatar-bubble messages with tool action blocks vs letter-writing format with wax-seal timestamps
differentiationFromPass5.settingsLayout: Grouped panels with plan comparison cards vs cozy control panel with knit dividers
differentiationFromPass5.motionFeel: Clean spring bounce (museum precision) vs soft curtain draw (textile warmth)
differentiationFromPass5.interactionTone: Professional warm glow vs intimate candlelight dance
